summary.summary: Bumps the development version constant APP_DEV_VERSION in Config.xcconfig from 0.8.4.8 to 0.8.4.9. (source: diff:60f545e375c4, file:26d452518827, commit:7b85e712bfcf)
summary.userFacingImpact: This commit only modifies a development version value (APP_DEV_VERSION) in a configuration file and does not change APP_VERSION or APP_BUILD_NUMBER in this diff (source: diff:60f545e375c4, file:26d452518827). There is no evidence in this commit of functional or runtime behavior changes; however, the user-facing impact cannot be fully determined from this single configuration change and should be confirmed by a human reviewer (source: commit:7b85e712bfcf).
